subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in discussing a potential partnership.

We would be happy to set up a 30-minute call. The following time windows are available:

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (UTC)

Please let us know which of these slots works best for you, and we’ll confirm the meeting with a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we’re not able to provide internal contact information, but you can find public contact channels and information about our leadership team on our public website.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
